lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਮਿ ਕਰੋਧਿ ਨ ਮੋਹੀਐ ਬਿਨਸੈ ਲੋਭੁ ਸੁਆਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: kaam karodh na moheeai binasai lobh suaan |
lines.english: Sexual desire and anger shall not seduce you, and the dog of greed shall depart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੈ ਮਾਰਗਿ ਚਲਦਿਆ ਉਸਤਤਿ ਕਰੇ ਜਹਾਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: sachai maarag chaladiaa usatat kare jahaan |
lines.english: Those who walk on the Path of Truth shall be praised throughout the world.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸ ਨੋ ਦੇਵੈ ਦਇਆ ਕਰਿ ਸੋਈ ਪੁਰਖੁ ਸੁਜਾਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: jis no devai deaa kar soee purakh sujaan |
lines.english: That person, upon whom the Lord bestows His Mercy, is a wise person.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਠਸਠਿ ਤੀਰਥ ਸਗਲ ਪੁੰਨ ਜੀਅ ਦਇਆ ਪਰਵਾਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: atthasatth teerath sagal pun jeea deaa paravaan |
lines.english: Be kind to all beings-this is more meritorious than bathing at the sixty-eight sacred shrines of pilgrimage and the giving of charity.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਘਿ ਸੁਚੇ ਸੇ ਕਾਂਢੀਅਹਿ ਜਿਨ ਪੂਰਾ ਗੁਰੁ ਮਿਹਰਵਾਨੁ ॥੧੨॥
lines.translit: maagh suche se kaandteeeh jin pooraa gur miharavaan |12|
lines.english: In Maagh, they alone are known as true, unto whom the Perfect Guru is Merciful. ||12||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨਾ ਮਿਲਿਆ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਆਪਣਾ ਨਾਨਕ ਤਿਨ ਕੁਰਬਾਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: jinaa miliaa prabh aapanaa naanak tin kurabaan |
lines.english: Nanak is a sacrifice to those who have merged with God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਫਲਗੁਣਿ ਅਨੰਦ ਉਪਾਰਜਨਾ ਹਰਿ ਸਜਣ ਪ੍ਰਗਟੇ ਆਇ ॥
lines.translit: falagun anand upaarajanaa har sajan pragatte aae |
lines.english: In the month of Phalgun, bliss comes to those, unto whom the Lord, the Friend, has been revealed.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਤ ਸਹਾਈ ਰਾਮ ਕੇ ਕਰਿ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਦੀਆ ਮਿਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: sant sahaaee raam ke kar kirapaa deea milaae |
lines.english: The Saints, the Lord's helpers, in their mercy, have united me with Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਛ ਪੁਨੀ ਵਡਭਾਗਣੀ ਵਰੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਹਰਿ ਰਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: eichh punee vaddabhaaganee var paaeaa har raae |
lines.english: My desires have been fulfilled-by great good fortune, I have obtained the Sovereign Lord as my Husband.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੇਜ ਸੁਹਾਵੀ ਸਰਬ ਸੁਖ ਹੁਣਿ ਦੁਖਾ ਨਾਹੀ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: sej suhaavee sarab sukh hun dukhaa naahee jaae |
lines.english: My bed is beautiful, and I have all comforts. I feel no sadness at all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਿਲਿ ਸਹੀਆ ਮੰਗਲੁ ਗਾਵਹੀ ਗੀਤ ਗੋਵਿੰਦ ਅਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: mil saheea mangal gaavahee geet govind alaae |
lines.english: Join with me, my sisters, and sing the songs of rejoicing and the Hymns of the Lord of the Universe.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਜੇਹਾ ਅਵਰੁ ਨ ਦਿਸਈ ਕੋਈ ਦੂਜਾ ਲਵੈ ਨ ਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: har jehaa avar na disee koee doojaa lavai na laae |
lines.english: There is no other like the Lord-there is no equal to Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਲਤੁ ਪਲਤੁ ਸਵਾਰਿਓਨੁ ਨਿਹਚਲ ਦਿਤੀਅਨੁ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: halat palat savaarion nihachal diteean jaae |
lines.english: He embellishes this world and the world hereafter, and He gives us our permanent home there.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਸਾਰ ਸਾਗਰ ਤੇ ਰਖਿਅਨੁ ਬਹੁੜਿ ਨ ਜਨਮੈ ਧਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: sansaar saagar te rakhian bahurr na janamai dhaae |
lines.english: He rescues us from the world-ocean; never again do we have to run the cycle of reincarnation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਹਵਾ ਏਕ ਅਨੇਕ ਗੁਣ ਤਰੇ ਨਾਨਕ ਚਰਣੀ ਪਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: jihavaa ek anek gun tare naanak charanee paae |
lines.english: I have only one tongue, but Your Glorious Virtues are beyond counting. Nanak is saved, falling at Your Feet.

lines.gurmukhi: ਫਲਗੁਣਿ ਨਿਤ ਸਲਾਹੀਐ ਜਿਸ ਨੋ ਤਿਲੁ ਨ ਤਮਾਇ ॥੧੩॥
lines.translit: falagun nit salaaheeai jis no til na tamaae |13|
lines.english: In Phalgun, praise Him continually; He has not even an iota of greed. ||13||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨਿ ਜਿਨਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਇਆ ਤਿਨ ਕੇ ਕਾਜ ਸਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: jin jin naam dhiaaeaa tin ke kaaj sare |
lines.english: Those who meditate on the Naam, the Name of the Lord-their affairs are all resolved.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਗੁਰੁ ਪੂਰਾ ਆਰਾਧਿਆ ਦਰਗਹ ਸਚਿ ਖਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: har gur pooraa aaraadhiaa daragah sach khare |
lines.english: Those who meditate on the Perfect Guru, the Lord-Incarnate-they are judged true in the Court of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਰਬ ਸੁਖਾ ਨਿਧਿ ਚਰਣ ਹਰਿ ਭਉਜਲੁ ਬਿਖਮੁ ਤਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: sarab sukhaa nidh charan har bhaujal bikham tare |
lines.english: The Lord's Feet are the Treasure of all peace and comfort for them; they cross over the terrifying and treacherous world-ocean.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੂੜ ਗਏ ਦੁਬਿਧਾ ਨਸੀ ਪੂਰਨ ਸਚਿ ਭਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: koorr ge dubidhaa nasee pooran sach bhare |
lines.english: Falsehood has vanished, duality has been erased, and they are totally overflowing with Truth.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰੇਮ ਭਗਤਿ ਤਿਨ ਪਾਈਆ ਬਿਖਿਆ ਨਾਹਿ ਜਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: prem bhagat tin paaeea bikhiaa naeh jare |
lines.english: They obtain love and devotion, and they do not burn in corruption.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਾਰਬ੍ਰਹਮੁ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਸੇਵਦੇ ਮਨ ਅੰਦਰਿ ਏਕੁ ਧਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: paarabraham prabh sevade man andar ek dhare |
lines.english: They serve the Supreme Lord God, and enshrine the One Lord within their minds.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕੁ ਮੰਗੈ ਦਰਸ ਦਾਨੁ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਕਰਹੁ ਹਰੇ ॥੧੪॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak mangai daras daan kirapaa karahu hare |14|1|
lines.english: Nanak begs for the blessing of Your Vision, O Lord. Please, shower Your Mercy upon me! ||14||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਹ ਦਿਵਸ ਮੂਰਤ ਭਲੇ ਜਿਸ ਕਉ ਨਦਰਿ ਕਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: maah divas moorat bhale jis kau nadar kare |
lines.english: The months, the days, and the moments are auspicious, for those upon whom the Lord casts His Glance of Grace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਝ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ਦਿਨ ਰੈਣਿ ॥
lines.translit: maajh mahalaa 5 din rain |
lines.english: Maajh, Fifth Mehl: Day And Night:

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੁ ਤਿਆਗਿ ਸਰਣੀ ਪਵਾਂ ਮੁਖਿ ਬੋਲੀ ਮਿਠੜੇ ਵੈਣ ॥
lines.translit: aap tiaag saranee pavaan mukh bolee mittharre vain |
lines.english: Renouncing selfishness and conceit, I seek His Sanctuary, and speak sweet words to Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੇਵੀ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਆਪਣਾ ਹਰਿ ਸਿਮਰੀ ਦਿਨ ਸਭਿ ਰੈਣ ॥
lines.translit: sevee satigur aapanaa har simaree din sabh rain |
lines.english: I serve my True Guru, and meditate on Him all day and night.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨਮ ਜਨਮ ਕਾ ਵਿਛੁੜਿਆ ਹਰਿ ਮੇਲਹੁ ਸਜਣੁ ਸੈਣ ॥
lines.translit: janam janam kaa vichhurriaa har melahu sajan sain |
lines.english: Through countless lifetimes and incarnations, I was separated from Him. O Lord, you are my Friend and Companion-please unite me with Yourself.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਪਿਰ ਬਿਨੁ ਚੈਨੁ ਨ ਪਾਈਐ ਖੋਜਿ ਡਿਠੇ ਸਭਿ ਗੈਣ ॥
lines.translit: har pir bin chain na paaeeai khoj dditthe sabh gain |
lines.english: Without their Husband Lord, they find no comfort. I have searched and seen all realms.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਜੀਅ ਹਰਿ ਤੇ ਵਿਛੁੜੇ ਸੇ ਸੁਖਿ ਨ ਵਸਨਿ ਭੈਣ ॥
lines.translit: jo jeea har te vichhurre se sukh na vasan bhain |
lines.english: Those who are separated from the Lord do not dwell in peace, O sister.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਿ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਰਾਖਿ ਲੇਹੁ ਹੋਰੁ ਨਾਹੀ ਕਰਣ ਕਰੇਣ ॥
lines.translit: kar kirapaa prabh raakh lehu hor naahee karan karen |
lines.english: Bestow Your Mercy, God, and save me! No one else can bestow Your Mercy.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪ ਕਮਾਣੈ ਵਿਛੁੜੀ ਦੋਸੁ ਨ ਕਾਹੂ ਦੇਣ ॥
lines.translit: aap kamaanai vichhurree dos na kaahoo den |
lines.english: My own evil actions have kept me separate from Him; why should I accuse anyone else?

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਤੁਧੁ ਵਿਣੁ ਖਾਕੂ ਰੂਲਣਾ ਕਹੀਐ ਕਿਥੈ ਵੈਣ ॥
lines.translit: har tudh vin khaakoo roolanaa kaheeai kithai vain |
lines.english: Without You, Lord, we roll around in the dust. Unto whom should we utter our cries of distress?

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਕੀ ਬੇਨੰਤੀਆ ਹਰਿ ਸੁਰਜਨੁ ਦੇਖਾ ਨੈਣ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak kee benanteea har surajan dekhaa nain |1|
lines.english: This is Nanak's prayer: "May my eyes behold the Lord, the Angelic Being." ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੀਅ ਕੀ ਬਿਰਥਾ ਸੋ ਸੁਣੇ ਹਰਿ ਸੰਮ੍ਰਿਥ ਪੁਰਖੁ ਅਪਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: jeea kee birathaa so sune har samrith purakh apaar |
lines.english: The Lord hears the anguish of the soul; He is the All-powerful and Infinite Primal Being.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਰਣਿ ਜੀਵਣਿ ਆਰਾਧਣਾ ਸਭਨਾ ਕਾ ਆਧਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: maran jeevan aaraadhanaa sabhanaa kaa aadhaar |
lines.english: In death and in life, worship and adore the Lord, the Support of all.
